insight: ChatControl's Discord integration requires the DiscordSRV plugin. Users must disable DiscordSRV's built-in chat relay by setting `DiscordChatChannelMinecraftToDiscord: false` in DiscordSRV's `config.yml`, otherwise messages get duplicated. ChatControl checks this on startup and logs a warning if it's still enabled (see ChatControl.java line ~247).

On Folia servers, PM Auto_Mode is force-disabled because Folia's Conversation API is broken. The workaround requires ProtocolLib specifically (not PacketEvents or other packet libraries) — Foundation's BukkitPacketListener intercepts chat packets via ProtocolLib and calls player.acceptConversationInput() on the correct thread. ProtocolLib and PacketEvents can coexist. Users on Folia who want Auto_Mode must install ProtocolLib.
